zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Neville於大約1360年出生在英國英格蘭達勒姆拉比時，她的父親John Neville24歲，母親Maud de Percy27歲。她於1378年與Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1447年7月16日在英國達勒姆斯特勒-斯崔特享年88歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Neville于大约1360年出生在英国英格兰達勒姆拉比时，她的父亲John Neville24岁，母亲Maud de Percy27岁。她于1378年与Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1447年7月16日在英国達勒姆斯特勒-斯崔特享年88岁。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevells
meanings: Irish: variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevils
meanings: English: variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Novel
meanings: English: variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .
English: variant of   Noel  .
English: variant of   Newhall  .

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Elinor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Neville was born about 1360, in Raby, Durham, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Neville, was 24 and her mother, Maud de Percy, was 27. She married Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley in 1378, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 16 July 1447, in Chester-le-Street, Durham, England, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Neville est née environ 1360, à Raby, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Neville, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Maud de Percy, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley en 1378, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 juillet 1447, à Chester-le-Street, Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 88 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Neville um 1360 in Raby, Durham, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Neville 24 und ihre Mutter Maud de Percy 27. Sie hat 1378 in England Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. Juli 1447 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Chester-le-Street, Durham, England.

Lei sposato Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley nel 1378, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 16 luglio 1447, nel Chester-le-Street, Durham, England, all'età di 88 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Neville(이)가 대략 1360년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 라비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Neville(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Percy(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1378년 영국에서 Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1447년 7월 16일 영국 뒤람 체스터-레-스트릿에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Angers, Departement de Maine-et-Loire, P: Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França
pt.Chester-Le-Street, Durham, England: Chester le Street, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Chester, Durham, England: Chester le Street, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Newcastle Upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Neville nasceu aproximadamente 1360, em Raby, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Neville, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Percy, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley em 1378, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de julho de 1447, em Chester-le-Street, Durham, Inglaterra, com 88 anos.

ru.Newcastle Upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Neville родилась около 1360 г. в местности раби, дурам, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Neville было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Maud de Percy, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley в 1378 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 16 июля 1447 г. в местности честир-ле-стрит, дурам, Англия в возрасте 88 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor Neville nació aproximadamente 1360, en Raby, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Neville, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Maud de Percy, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley en 1378, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 16 de julio de 1447, en Chester-le-Street, Durham, Inglaterra, a la edad de 88 años.
